<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,viewport-fit=cover">
<meta name="description" content="Complexe Siama — Portfolio Branding 380° — Hôtellerie Gastronomie Événementiel Abidjan">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a08">
<meta property="og:title" content="Complexe Siama — Portfolio Branding 380°">
<meta property="og:description" content="33 créations visuelles officielles — Hôtellerie · Gastronomie · Événementiel · Abidjan CI">
<title>Complexe Siama — Portfolio Branding 380°</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,700;1,400;1,500&family=DM+Sans:wght@200;300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   RESET
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
*,::before,::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{font-size:16px;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;scroll-behavior:smooth;height:100%}
body{
  min-height:100%;
  font-family:'DM Sans',system-ui,sans-serif;
  font-weight:300;
  background:#0a0a08;
  color:#ede8dc;
  overflow-x:hidden;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
}
:root{
  --au:#c8a000;    /* or authentique */
  --ab:#e0bc20;    /* or brillant   */
  --al:#f4d448;    /* or lumière    */
  --as:#f8eaa0;    /* or satin      */
  --ad:#8a6a00;    /* or doré       */
  --vr:#133010;    /* vert profond  */
  --vb:#1c4018;    /* vert base     */
  --nc:#0a0a08;    /* noir chaud    */
  --tx:#ede8dc;    /* texte        */
  --t2:rgba(237,232,220,.60);
  --t3:rgba(237,232,220,.28);
  --bd:rgba(200,160,0,.16);
  --bh:rgba(224,188,32,.45);
}
::selection{background:var(--ab);color:#000}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--ad);border-radius:2px}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
ANIMATIONS
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
@keyframes fadeUp{
from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px)}
to  {opacity:1;transform:none}
}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
@keyframes cardUp{
from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}
to  {opacity:1;transform:none}
}
@keyframes goldFlow{
0%  {background-position:0% 50%}
50% {background-position:100% 50%}
100%{background-position:0% 50%}
}
@keyframes shimmer{
0%  {background-position:-400% center}
100%{background-position:400% center}
}
@keyframes glow{
0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 14px rgba(200,160,0,.45))}
50%    {filter:drop-shadow(0 0 32px rgba(224,188,32,.8))}
}
@keyframes borderPulse{
0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:.75}
}
@keyframes scanLine{
0%{transform:translateY(-100%)}100%{transform:translateY(400%)}
}

.gold-text{
background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(–ad),var(–au),var(–ab),var(–al),var(–as),var(–al),var(–ab),var(–au),var(–ad));
background-size:400%;
-webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;
-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
animation:shimmer 5s linear infinite;
}
.glow-logo{animation:glow 3.5s ease infinite}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
SPLASH / COVER
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.splash{
position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9999;
background:var(–nc);
display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
gap:24px;
transition:opacity .6s ease, visibility .6s;
}
.splash.hide{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none}
.splash-logo{width:160px;height:auto;animation:glow 2.5s ease infinite}
.splash-ring{
width:56px;height:56px;
border:2px solid rgba(200,160,0,.2);
border-top-color:var(–ab);
border-radius:50%;
animation:spin 1s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.splash-txt{
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;
font-size:13px;font-style:italic;
color:var(–t2);letter-spacing:2px;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
HEADER
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hdr{
position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:200;
height:62px;
background:rgba(10,10,8,.88);
border-bottom:1px solid var(–bd);
backdrop-filter:blur(24px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(24px);
display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
padding:0 clamp(16px,4vw,44px);
box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(224,188,32,.12),0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
}
.hdr-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;min-width:0}
.hdr-logo{height:36px;width:auto;flex-shrink:0;animation:glow 3.5s ease infinite}
.hdr-name{
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;
font-size:15px;font-weight:500;
letter-spacing:2.5px;color:var(–al);
white-space:nowrap;
}
.hdr-sub{
font-size:9px;font-weight:300;
color:var(–t3);letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:1px;
white-space:nowrap;
}
.hdr-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-shrink:0}
.hdr-pill{
font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:1.5px;
padding:6px 16px;
border:1px solid var(–bh);
color:var(–ab);
background:rgba(200,160,0,.08);
cursor:pointer;
transition:all .22s;
white-space:nowrap;
}
.hdr-pill:hover{background:rgba(200,160,0,.18);border-color:var(–al)}
.hdr-share-btn{
display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:1.5px;
padding:7px 18px;
background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–ad),var(–au),var(–ab));
color:#000;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .2s;
-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
}
.hdr-share-btn:hover{opacity:.88}
@media(max-width:480px){.hdr-sub,.hdr-pill{display:none}}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
HERO
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hero{
min-height:100svh;
display:grid;place-items:center;
padding:80px clamp(18px,5vw,60px) 48px;
text-align:center;
position:relative;overflow:hidden;
background:
radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 70% at 50% 30%,rgba(200,160,0,.11) 0%,transparent 60%),
radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 15% 85%,rgba(19,48,16,.5) 0%,transparent 55%),
var(–nc);
}
/* Animated texture */
.hero-grain{
position:absolute;inset:0;
background-image:url(“data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox=‘0 0 256 256’ xmlns=‘http://www.w3.org/2000/svg’%3E%3Cfilter id=‘n’%3E%3CfeTurbulence type=‘fractalNoise’ baseFrequency=’.85’ numOctaves=‘4’ stitchTiles=‘stitch’/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width=‘100%25’ height=‘100%25’ filter=‘url(%23n)’ opacity=’.04’/%3E%3C/svg%3E”);
opacity:.4;pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-grid-bg{
position:absolute;inset:0;
background-image:
linear-gradient(rgba(200,160,0,.05) 1px,transparent 1px),
linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(200,160,0,.05) 1px,transparent 1px);
background-size:52px 52px;
opacity:.6;pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:900px;width:100%}
.hero-eyebrow{
font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:5px;
color:var(–au);text-transform:uppercase;
margin-bottom:20px;
animation:fadeUp .7s ease both;
}
.hero-logo-wrap{
margin-bottom:28px;
animation:fadeUp .7s ease .08s both;opacity:0;
}
.hero-logo-wrap img{
max-width:320px;width:62vw;height:auto;
filter:drop-shadow(0 16px 60px rgba(200,160,0,.75));
animation:glow 3.5s ease infinite;
}
.hero-h1{
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;
font-size:clamp(32px,6vw,72px);
font-weight:400;line-height:1.08;
margin-bottom:18px;
animation:fadeUp .7s ease .16s both;opacity:0;
}
.hero-h1 em{font-style:italic;font-weight:300}
.hero-tagline{
font-size:clamp(13px,1.8vw,17px);
font-weight:300;font-style:italic;
color:var(–t2);margin-bottom:8px;
animation:fadeUp .7s ease .22s both;opacity:0;
}
.hero-desc{
font-size:clamp(11px,1.3vw,13px);
font-weight:300;color:var(–t3);
max-width:580px;margin:0 auto 32px;
line-height:1.8;letter-spacing:.3px;
animation:fadeUp .7s ease .28s both;opacity:0;
}
/* Stats row */
.hero-stats{
display:flex;gap:0;justify-content:center;
margin-bottom:36px;
animation:fadeUp .7s ease .34s both;opacity:0;
border:1px solid var(–bd);max-width:480px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;
}
.hstat{
flex:1;padding:18px 12px;
border-right:1px solid var(–bd);
text-align:center;
}
.hstat:last-child{border-right:none}
.hstat-val{
display:block;
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;
font-size:clamp(26px,4vw,40px);
font-weight:400;line-height:1;
}
.hstat-lbl{
display:block;font-size:9px;font-weight:400;
letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;
color:var(–t3);margin-top:5px;
}
/* CTA */
.hero-cta{
display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;
animation:fadeUp .7s ease .42s both;opacity:0;
}
.btn-prim{
display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;
font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;
font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
padding:14px 30px;
background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–ad),var(–au),var(–ab));
color:#000;border:none;cursor:pointer;
transition:transform .22s,box-shadow .22s;
box-shadow:0 6px 26px rgba(200,160,0,.4);
-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;text-decoration:none;
}
.btn-prim:hover,.btn-prim:active{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(200,160,0,.6)}
.btn-sec{
display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;
font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;
font-size:11px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
padding:14px 30px;
background:transparent;
color:var(–ab);
border:1px solid var(–bh);cursor:pointer;
transition:all .22s;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;text-decoration:none;
}
.btn-sec:hover{background:rgba(200,160,0,.08);border-color:var(–al)}
/* Scroll hint */
.scroll-hint{
position:absolute;bottom:28px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;
animation:fadeIn 1s ease 1.2s both;opacity:0;
}
.scroll-hint span{font-size:9px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–t3)}
.scroll-mouse{
width:22px;height:34px;border:1px solid var(–t3);
border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding:5px;
}
.scroll-wheel{
width:3px;height:6px;background:var(–au);border-radius:2px;
animation:scrollWheel 1.6s ease infinite;
}
@keyframes scrollWheel{0%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}80%{transform:translateY(8px);opacity:0}100%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:0}}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
ABOUT SECTION
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.about-sec{
padding:clamp(60px,8vw,100px) clamp(18px,5vw,60px);
background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(–nc),rgba(19,48,16,.12) 50%,var(–nc));
display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(32px,6vw,80px);align-items:center;
}
@media(max-width:680px){.about-sec{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.about-img-wrap{text-align:center}
.about-img-wrap img{max-width:280px;width:70%;height:auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 8px 36px rgba(200,160,0,.5));animation:glow 4s ease infinite}
.sec-label{font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–au);margin-bottom:12px}
.sec-title{
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;
font-size:clamp(22px,3.5vw,36px);font-weight:400;
line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:16px;
}
.gold-rule{width:48px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(–ad),var(–ab));margin-bottom:18px}
.about-p{font-size:13.5px;font-weight:300;color:var(–t2);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:12px;letter-spacing:.2px}
.svc-wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-top:18px}
.svc{
padding:9px 12px;
background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);
border-left:2px solid var(–au);
font-size:12px;font-weight:300;color:var(–t2);
letter-spacing:.3px;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
NUMBERS / CHIFFRES
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.numbers-sec{
padding:clamp(48px,6vw,80px) clamp(18px,5vw,60px);
background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(19,48,16,.18),rgba(200,160,0,.04),rgba(19,48,16,.18));
text-align:center;
}
.numbers-grid{
display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr));
gap:1px;background:var(–bd);
border:1px solid var(–bd);
max-width:860px;margin:0 auto;overflow:hidden;
}
.num-card{
padding:30px 18px;background:var(–nc);text-align:center;
transition:background .22s;
}
.num-card:hover{background:rgba(200,160,0,.05)}
.num-val{
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;
font-size:clamp(32px,5vw,52px);font-weight:400;line-height:1;
display:block;margin-bottom:8px;
}
.num-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–t3)}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
PORTFOLIO SECTION
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pf-sec{
padding:clamp(48px,6vw,72px) 0 clamp(60px,8vw,100px);
background:var(–nc);
}
.pf-header{
padding:0 clamp(18px,5vw,60px);
margin-bottom:32px;
display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;
}
.pf-head-left .sec-title{margin-bottom:4px}
.pf-count{
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;
font-size:13px;font-style:italic;color:var(–t2);
}
/* WM notice */
.wm-bar{
margin:0 clamp(18px,5vw,60px) 20px;
padding:12px 18px;
background:rgba(200,160,0,.06);
border:1px solid rgba(200,160,0,.2);
display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;
font-size:11.5px;font-weight:300;color:var(–t2);letter-spacing:.3px;
}
.wm-bar svg{flex-shrink:0;color:var(–ab)}

/* TABS */
.tabs-wrap{
padding:0 clamp(18px,5vw,60px);
margin-bottom:24px;
display:flex;gap:0;
overflow-x:auto;
scrollbar-width:none;
border-bottom:1px solid var(–bd);
}
.tabs-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.tab{
flex-shrink:0;
padding:10px 20px;
font-size:11px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;
color:var(–t3);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;
transition:all .22s;white-space:nowrap;background:none;border-top:none;border-left:none;border-right:none;
font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
}
.tab:hover{color:var(–ab)}
.tab.on{color:var(–ab);border-bottom-color:var(–ab)}
.tab .n{
display:inline-block;margin-left:6px;
font-size:9px;color:var(–t3);
background:rgba(200,160,0,.1);border:1px solid rgba(200,160,0,.2);
border-radius:9px;padding:1px 6px;transition:all .22s;
}
.tab.on .n,.tab:hover .n{background:rgba(200,160,0,.2);border-color:var(–ab);color:var(–ab)}

/* SEARCH */
.search-row{
padding:0 clamp(18px,5vw,60px);
margin-bottom:24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.search-wrap{
display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(–bd);
padding:0 14px;height:40px;transition:border-color .2s;
max-width:340px;width:100%;
}
.search-wrap:focus-within{border-color:var(–ab)}
.search-wrap svg{color:var(–t3);flex-shrink:0}
.search-wrap input{
background:transparent;border:none;outline:none;
font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:300;
color:var(–tx);width:100%;letter-spacing:.3px;
}
.search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(–t3)}
.res-count{font-size:11px;font-weight:300;color:var(–t3);letter-spacing:1px;white-space:nowrap}

/* GRID */
.pf-grid{
display:grid;
grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(290px,1fr));
gap:1px;
background:rgba(200,160,0,.08);
padding:0 clamp(18px,5vw,60px);
}
@media(max-width:520px){.pf-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;padding:0 1px;gap:1px}}
@media(max-width:320px){.pf-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:0}}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CARD
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pcard{
position:relative;background:var(–nc);cursor:pointer;
aspect-ratio:4/3;overflow:hidden;
-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
}
.pcard img{
position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;
object-fit:cover;display:block;
transition:transform .55s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94),filter .4s;
filter:brightness(.82) saturate(.9);
will-change:transform;
}
.pcard:hover img{transform:scale(1.07);filter:brightness(.95) saturate(1)}
@media(hover:none){.pcard:active img{transform:scale(1.03)}}

/* Overlay */
.pcard-ov{
position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:2;
background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 25%,rgba(6,6,4,.5) 60%,rgba(6,6,4,.9) 100%);
opacity:0;transition:opacity .32s;
display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;
padding:20px;
}
.pcard:hover .pcard-ov{opacity:1}

.pcard-lbl{
font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
color:var(–ab);margin-bottom:6px;
transform:translateY(6px);transition:transform .32s .04s;
}
.pcard:hover .pcard-lbl{transform:none}
.pcard-name{
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;
font-size:17px;font-weight:400;color:#fff;
line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:14px;
transform:translateY(8px);transition:transform .32s .06s;
}
.pcard:hover .pcard-name{transform:none}
.pcard-btns{
display:flex;gap:7px;
opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);
transition:opacity .32s .1s,transform .32s .1s;
}
.pcard:hover .pcard-btns{opacity:1;transform:none}

.pb-view{
font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
padding:8px 16px;background:var(–au);color:#000;border:none;cursor:pointer;
font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;transition:background .2s;
-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
}
.pb-view:hover{background:var(–al)}
.pb-dl{
font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
padding:8px 14px;
background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;
border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);
cursor:pointer;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;
text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;
-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
}
.pb-dl:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2)}

/* Always-visible badge */
.pcard-badge{
position:absolute;top:12px;left:12px;z-index:3;
font-size:8px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
padding:3px 9px;
background:rgba(6,6,4,.72);border:1px solid rgba(200,160,0,.3);
color:var(–ab);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
transition:opacity .3s;
}
.pcard:hover .pcard-badge{opacity:0}
.pcard-wm{
position:absolute;bottom:10px;right:10px;z-index:3;
font-size:8px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:1px;
padding:2px 7px;background:rgba(6,6,4,.6);
border:1px solid rgba(200,160,0,.18);color:rgba(200,160,0,.6);
backdrop-filter:blur(5px);
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
LIGHTBOX
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.lb{
position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1000;
background:rgba(4,4,3,.97);
backdrop-filter:blur(28px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(28px);
display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
padding:clamp(14px,3vw,24px);
}
.lb.open{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .25s ease}
.lb-wrap{
position:relative;
max-width:min(90vw,1000px);
max-height:74vh;
}
.lb-img{
display:block;max-width:100%;max-height:74vh;
width:auto;height:auto;object-fit:contain;
}
/* Corner decorations */
.lbc{position:absolute;width:18px;height:18px}
.lbc-tl{top:-1px;left:-1px;border-top:1.5px solid var(–ab);border-left:1.5px solid var(–ab)}
.lbc-tr{top:-1px;right:-1px;border-top:1.5px solid var(–ab);border-right:1.5px solid var(–ab)}
.lbc-bl{bottom:-1px;left:-1px;border-bottom:1.5px solid var(–ab);border-left:1.5px solid var(–ab)}
.lbc-br{bottom:-1px;right:-1px;border-bottom:1.5px solid var(–ab);border-right:1.5px solid var(–ab)}
/* Scan line effect */
.lb-scan{
position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:30%;
background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(200,160,0,.04),transparent);
animation:scanLine 2.5s ease infinite;
pointer-events:none;
}

.lb-footer{
margin-top:18px;
display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;
}
.lb-title{
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;
font-size:16px;font-style:italic;font-weight:400;color:#fff;
}
.lb-cat{
font-size:8px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;
padding:4px 12px;border:1px solid var(–ab);color:var(–ab);
}
.lb-num{font-size:10px;font-weight:300;color:var(–t3);letter-spacing:2px}
.lb-wm-tag{font-size:9px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:rgba(200,160,0,.45)}
.lb-dl-btn{
display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
padding:10px 22px;background:var(–au);color:#000;
border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;
text-decoration:none;transition:background .2s;
}
.lb-dl-btn:hover{background:var(–ab)}

.lb-close{
position:fixed;top:16px;right:18px;z-index:1001;
width:40px;height:40px;background:transparent;
border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);
color:#fff;font-size:17px;cursor:pointer;
display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
transition:border-color .2s,background .2s;font-family:‘DM Sans’,sans-serif;
}
.lb-close:hover{border-color:var(–ab);background:rgba(200,160,0,.1)}
.lb-arr{
position:fixed;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
width:46px;height:46px;background:transparent;
border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);color:#fff;
font-size:24px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
transition:all .2s;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
}
.lb-arr:hover{border-color:var(–ab);background:rgba(200,160,0,.1)}
.lb-p{left:12px}.lb-nx{right:12px}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
CONTACT
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cnt-sec{
padding:clamp(60px,8vw,100px) clamp(18px,5vw,60px);
background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(–nc),rgba(19,48,16,.18) 60%,rgba(10,10,8,.95));
text-align:center;
}
.cnt-grid{
display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(180px,1fr));
gap:1px;background:var(–bd);border:1px solid var(–bd);
max-width:820px;margin:28px auto;overflow:hidden;
}
.cnt-card{
padding:22px 16px;background:var(–nc);text-align:left;
transition:background .22s;
}
.cnt-card:hover{background:rgba(200,160,0,.05)}
.cnt-ico{font-size:18px;margin-bottom:8px}
.cnt-lbl{font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–au);margin-bottom:4px}
.cnt-val{font-size:12.5px;font-weight:300;color:var(–t2);line-height:1.55;word-break:break-all}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
FOOTER
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.ftr{
padding:40px clamp(18px,5vw,60px) 28px;
background:#060604;border-top:1px solid var(–bd);
}
.ftr-inner{
max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;
display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr;gap:28px;
}
@media(max-width:560px){.ftr-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.ftr-logo{height:52px;margin-bottom:12px;filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgba(200,160,0,.5));animation:glow 4s ease infinite}
.ftr-name{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(–al);margin-bottom:6px}
.ftr-desc{font-size:11.5px;font-weight:300;color:var(–t3);line-height:1.65}
.ftr-col h4{font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(–au);margin-bottom:12px}
.ftr-a{display:block;font-size:12px;font-weight:300;color:var(–t3);text-decoration:none;margin-bottom:7px;transition:color .2s;letter-spacing:.3px}
.ftr-a:hover{color:var(–al)}
.ftr-bot{
border-top:1px solid var(–bd);margin-top:24px;padding-top:16px;
text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:300;color:var(–t3);letter-spacing:1px;
}
.ftr-wm{margin-top:5px;font-size:9.5px;color:rgba(200,160,0,.38);font-style:italic}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
TOAST (share feedback)
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.toast{
position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(80px);
z-index:2000;opacity:0;
background:var(–ab);color:#000;
font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:1.5px;
padding:12px 24px;
transition:all .35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;
}
.toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────
MISC
───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.empty-state{
grid-column:1/-1;padding:80px 20px;text-align:center;
font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:20px;font-style:italic;color:var(–t3);
}
.mb20{margin-bottom:20px}
</style>

</head>
<body>
<div class="splash" id="splash">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Complexe Siama" class="splash-logo">
  <div class="splash-ring"></div>
  <p class="splash-txt">Chargement du portfolio&hellip;</p>
</div>
<header class="hdr">
  <div class="hdr-brand">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Logo" class="hdr-logo">
    <div>
      <div class="hdr-name">COMPLEXE SIAMA</div>
      <div class="hdr-sub">H&ocirc;tellerie &middot; Gastronomie &middot; &Eacute;v&eacute;nementiel</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hdr-actions">
    <button class="hdr-pill" onclick="share()">&#128279; Partager</button>
    <button class="hdr-share-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('pf').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
      <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
      Portfolio
    </button>
  </div>
</header>
<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-grain"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Portfolio de Pr&eacute;sentation Officielle &bull; Branding 380&deg;</p>
    <div class="hero-logo-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Complexe Siama"></div>
    <h1 class="hero-h1"><span class="gold-text">Complexe Siama</span><br><em>Branding &amp; Identit&eacute; Visuelle 380&deg;</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">L&rsquo;Oasis Distinctive d&rsquo;H&ocirc;tellerie, Gastronomie &amp; &Eacute;v&eacute;nements</p>
    <p class="hero-desc">33 supports visuels officiels filigranes &bull; Textile brod&eacute; &bull; Print premium &bull; Digital &bull; Gastronomie &bull; Abidjan, C&ocirc;te d&rsquo;Ivoire</p>
    <div class="hero-stats mb20">
      <div class="hstat"><span class="hstat-val gold-text">33</span><span class="hstat-lbl">Supports</span></div>
      <div class="hstat"><span class="hstat-val gold-text">9</span><span class="hstat-lbl">Cat&eacute;gories</span></div>
      <div class="hstat"><span class="hstat-val gold-text">&copy;</span><span class="hstat-lbl">Prot&eacute;g&eacute;</span></div>
      <div class="hstat"><span class="hstat-val gold-text">HD</span><span class="hstat-lbl">Qualit&eacute;</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <button class="btn-prim" onclick="document.getElementById('pf').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
        Voir le Portfolio
      </button>
      <button class="btn-sec" onclick="share()">&#128279; Partager ce lien</button>
      <a href="#cnt" class="btn-sec">Nous Contacter</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint"><span>D&eacute;filer</span><div class="scroll-mouse"><div class="scroll-wheel"></div></div></div>
</section>
<section class="about-sec" id="about">
  <div class="about-img-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Complexe Siama"></div>
  <div>
    <p class="sec-label">&Agrave; propos du Complexe Siama</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Excellence au C&oelig;ur<br><em>de l&rsquo;Exp&eacute;rience</em></h2>
    <div class="gold-rule"></div>
    <p class="about-p">Le Complexe Siama est une destination premium &agrave; Abidjan offrant une exp&eacute;rience int&eacute;gr&eacute;e d&rsquo;h&ocirc;tellerie de prestige, de gastronomie ivoirienne authentique et d&rsquo;&eacute;v&eacute;nementiel grand format.</p>
    <p class="about-p">Ce portfolio pr&eacute;sente l&rsquo;int&eacute;gralit&eacute; de notre communication visuelle &mdash; 33 supports officiels avec filigrane de protection &copy;, organis&eacute;s en 9 cat&eacute;gories.</p>
    <div class="svc-wrap">
      <div class="svc">&#127968; H&ocirc;tellerie Premium</div>
      <div class="svc">&#127869; Gastronomie Ivoirienne</div>
      <div class="svc">&#127866; Bar &amp; Cave S&eacute;lect</div>
      <div class="svc">&#127914; &Eacute;v&eacute;nements &amp; Mariages</div>
      <div class="svc">&#127925; Maquis &amp; Animation</div>
      <div class="svc">&#127946; Piscine &amp; Spa</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
<section class="numbers-sec">
  <p class="sec-label" style="margin-bottom:12px">Branding en Chiffres</p>
  <h2 class="sec-title" style="margin-bottom:24px">Notre Communication</h2>
  <div class="numbers-grid">
    <div class="num-card"><span class="num-val gold-text">33</span><span class="num-lbl">Supports</span></div>
    <div class="num-card"><span class="num-val gold-text">9</span><span class="num-lbl">Cat&eacute;gories</span></div>
    <div class="num-card"><span class="num-val gold-text">380&deg;</span><span class="num-lbl">Couverture</span></div>
    <div class="num-card"><span class="num-val gold-text">30</span><span class="num-lbl">Recettes ivoriennes</span></div>
    <div class="num-card"><span class="num-val gold-text">8K</span><span class="num-lbl">Qualit&eacute; max</span></div>
    <div class="num-card"><span class="num-val gold-text">100%</span><span class="num-lbl">Prot&eacute;g&eacute; &copy;</span></div>
  </div>
</section>
<section class="pf-sec" id="pf">
  <div class="pf-header">
    <div class="pf-head-left"><p class="sec-label">Portfolio Officiel</p><h2 class="sec-title">Branding Complet 380&deg;</h2></div>
    <p class="pf-count" id="pf-count">33 cr&eacute;ations officielles</p>
  </div>
  <div class="wm-bar">
    <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
    <span><strong style="color:var(--al)">&copy; Filigrane de protection</strong> &mdash; Toutes les images portent le filigrane COMPLEXE SIAMA &bull; Propri&eacute;t&eacute; exclusive &bull; Abidjan 2025</span>
  </div>
  <div class="tabs-wrap" id="tabs">
    <button class="tab on" data-cat="all">Tous<span class="n">33</span></button>
    <button class="tab" data-cat="logo">Logo<span class="n">4</span></button>
    <button class="tab" data-cat="charte">Charte<span class="n">1</span></button>
    <button class="tab" data-cat="textile">Textile<span class="n">7</span></button>
    <button class="tab" data-cat="objet">Objets<span class="n">7</span></button>
    <button class="tab" data-cat="accessoire">Accessoires<span class="n">3</span></button>
    <button class="tab" data-cat="print">Print<span class="n">7</span></button>
    <button class="tab" data-cat="emballage">Emballage<span class="n">1</span></button>
    <button class="tab" data-cat="gastro">Gastronomie<span class="n">2</span></button>
    <button class="tab" data-cat="digital">Digital<span class="n">1</span></button>
  </div>
  <div class="search-row">
    <div class="search-wrap">
      <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="M21 21l-4.35-4.35"/></svg>
      <input type="search" id="srch" placeholder="Rechercher un support&hellip;">
    </div>
    <span class="res-count" id="rc">33 supports affich&eacute;s</span>
  </div>
  <div class="pf-grid" id="grid"></div>
</section>
<section class="cnt-sec" id="cnt">
  <p class="sec-label">Contact</p>
  <h2 class="sec-title">R&eacute;servations &amp; Informations</h2>
  <div class="gold-rule" style="margin:14px auto 10px"></div>
  <p style="font-size:13px;font-weight:300;color:var(--t2);max-width:420px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.75">Pour r&eacute;servations, &eacute;v&eacute;nements, collaborations ou informations.</p>
  <div class="cnt-grid">
    <div class="cnt-card"><div class="cnt-ico">&#128241;</div><div class="cnt-lbl">T&eacute;l&eacute;phone</div><div class="cnt-val">+225 27 22 00 00 00</div></div>
    <div class="cnt-card"><div class="cnt-ico">&#9993;&#65039;</div><div class="cnt-lbl">Email</div><div class="cnt-val"><a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="a2c6cbd0c7c1d6cbcdcce2c1cdcfd2cec7dac7d1cbc3cfc38cc1cb">[email&#160;protected]</a></div></div>
    <div class="cnt-card"><div class="cnt-ico">&#127760;</div><div class="cnt-lbl">Site Web</div><div class="cnt-val">www.complexesiama.ci</div></div>
    <div class="cnt-card"><div class="cnt-ico">&#128205;</div><div class="cnt-lbl">Adresse</div><div class="cnt-val">Plateau, Abidjan<br>C&ocirc;te d&rsquo;Ivoire</div></div>
    <div class="cnt-card"><div class="cnt-ico">&#128216;</div><div class="cnt-lbl">Facebook</div><div class="cnt-val">@complexesiama</div></div>
    <div class="cnt-card"><div class="cnt-ico">&#128247;</div><div class="cnt-lbl">Instagram</div><div class="cnt-val">@complexesiama</div></div>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-prim" onclick="location.href='mailto:direction@complexesiama.ci'">
    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
    Envoyer un Message
  </button>
</section>
<footer class="ftr">
  <div class="ftr-inner">
    <div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Complexe Siama" class="ftr-logo">
      <div class="ftr-name">COMPLEXE SIAMA</div>
      <p class="ftr-desc">L&rsquo;Oasis Distinctive d&rsquo;H&ocirc;tellerie, Gastronomie &amp; &Eacute;v&eacute;nements &bull; Abidjan, C&ocirc;te d&rsquo;Ivoire.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="ftr-col"><h4>Services</h4>
      <a href="#" class="ftr-a">&#127968; H&ocirc;tellerie</a>
      <a href="#" class="ftr-a">&#127869; Gastronomie</a>
      <a href="#" class="ftr-a">&#127914; &Eacute;v&eacute;nementiel</a>
      <a href="#" class="ftr-a">&#127866; Bar &amp; Cave</a>
      <a href="#" class="ftr-a">&#127925; Maquis</a>
    </div>
    <div class="ftr-col"><h4>Portfolio</h4>
      <a href="#pf" class="ftr-a">Branding 380&deg;</a>
      <a href="#about" class="ftr-a">&Agrave; propos</a>
      <a href="#cnt" class="ftr-a">Contact</a>
      <a href="#home" class="ftr-a">Haut de page</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="ftr-bot">&copy; 2025 Complexe Siama &bull; Tous droits r&eacute;serv&eacute;s &bull; Plateau, Abidjan, C&ocirc;te d&rsquo;Ivoire
    <div class="ftr-wm">&#128274; Images prot&eacute;g&eacute;es par filigrane &copy; COMPLEXE SIAMA &mdash; Reproduction interdite sans autorisation</div>
  </div>
</footer>

<div class="lb" id="lb">
  <button class="lb-close" id="lb-x">&#x2715;</button>
  <button class="lb-arr lb-p" id="lb-p">&#8249;</button>
  <button class="lb-arr lb-nx" id="lb-nx">&#8250;</button>
  <div class="lb-wrap">
    <img class="lb-img" id="lb-i" src="" alt="">
    <div class="lbc lbc-tl"></div><div class="lbc lbc-tr"></div>
    <div class="lbc lbc-bl"></div><div class="lbc lbc-br"></div>
    <div class="lb-scan"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="lb-footer">
    <span id="lb-t" class="lb-title"></span>
    <span id="lb-c" class="lb-cat"></span>
    <span id="lb-n" class="lb-num"></span>
    <span class="lb-wm-tag">&copy; Filigrane Complexe Siama</span>
    <a id="lb-d" class="lb-dl-btn" href="#" download>
      <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 3v12M7 11l5 5 5-5M3 17v3a1 1 0 001 1h16a1 1 0 001-1v-3"/></svg>
      T&eacute;l&eacute;charger
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="toast" id="toast">&#128279; Lien copi&eacute; dans le presse-papier !</div>
<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script id="D" type="application/json">

"data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5391.jpg", "l": "Porte-cl\u00e9 Or \u00b7 Mug Blanc \u00b7 Stylo Dor\u00e9", "c": "objet", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5357.jpg", "l": "Porte-cl\u00e9 M\u00e9daille Or", "c": "objet", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5406.jpg", "l": "Tasse Caf\u00e9 Porcelaine Premium", "c": "objet", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5392.jpg", "l": "Carte Gold \u00b7 Badge \u00b7 Luggage Tag", "c": "objet", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5361.jpg", "l": "Cartes de Visite Stack Ivoire", "c": "objet", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5362.jpg", "l": "Badge + Lanyard Corporate", "c": "objet", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5365.jpg", "l": "Luggage Tag Cuir \u2014 Valise", "c": "objet", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5404.jpg", "l": "Tote Bag Toile \u2014 Piscine Luxe", "c": "accessoire", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5395.jpg", "l": "Laptop Sticker \u00b7 Tote Noir \u00b7 Sac Cadeau", "c": "accessoire", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5366.jpg", "l": "Laptop Sticker Grand Format", "c": "accessoire", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5388.jpg", "l": "Flyer A4 \u2014 30 Recettes Ivoriennes", "c": "print", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5382.jpg", "l": "Flyer Menu D\u00e9couvertes \u2014 8 Plats", "c": "print", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5405.jpg", "l": "Cartes de Visite Vert & Or sur Bois", "c": "print", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5403.jpg", "l": "Kak\u00e9mono Hall H\u00f4tel Luxe \u2014 80\u00d7200cm", "c": "print", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5385.jpg", "l": "Kak\u00e9mono Gastronomique \u2014 Photos Plats", "c": "print", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5386.jpg", "l": "Catalogue Luxe \u2014 Couverture", "c": "print", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5396.jpg", "l": "Ruban \u00b7 B\u00e2che Num\u00e9rique \u00b7 A3 \u00b7 Vinyle", "c": "print", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5372.jpg", "l": "Box Traiteur + Sac Kraft \u2014 Take-away", "c": "emballage", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5402.jpg", "l": "Carte des Saveurs \u2014 Menu Ouvert", "c": "gastro", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5374.jpg", "l": "Menu Restaurant \u2014 Plats Servis Table", "c": "gastro", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}, {"f": "IMG_5401.jpg", "l": "R\u00e9seaux Sociaux \u2014 Facebook \u00b7 Instagram \u00b7 LinkedIn", "c": "digital", "t": "data:image/jpeg;base64,", "s": "data:image/jpeg;base64,"}]
</script>

<script>
(function(){
'use strict';

/* ─── Data ─── */
var ALL = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('D').textContent);
var CN = {
  logo:'Logo & Identit\u00e9', charte:'Charte Graphique', textile:'Textile & Broderie',
  objet:'Objets Corporate', accessoire:'Sacs & Accessoires', print:'Print & Signal\u00e9tique',
  emballage:'Emballage', gastro:'Gastronomie', digital:'Digital & R\u00e9seaux'
};

var cur = 0, fil = 'all';

/* ─── Card builder ─── */
function mkCard(a, gi) {
  var d = document.createElement('div');
  d.className = 'pcard';
  d.setAttribute('tabindex','0');
  d.setAttribute('role','button');
  d.setAttribute('aria-label', a.l);

  /* Image */
  var img = document.createElement('img');
  img.loading = 'lazy';
  img.alt = a.l;
  img.decoding = 'async';
  img.style.opacity = '0';
  img.style.transition = 'opacity .5s';
  img.onload = function(){ this.style.opacity = '1'; };
  img.src = a.t;

  /* Overlay */
  var ov  = document.createElement('div'); ov.className  = 'pcard-ov';
  var lbl = document.createElement('div'); lbl.className = 'pcard-lbl'; lbl.textContent = CN[a.c]||a.c;
  var nm  = document.createElement('div'); nm.className  = 'pcard-name'; nm.textContent = a.l;
  var btns= document.createElement('div'); btns.className= 'pcard-btns';

  var bv = document.createElement('button'); bv.className = 'pb-view'; bv.textContent = 'Voir';
  bv.onclick = function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); oLb(gi); };

  var bd = document.createElement('a'); bd.className = 'pb-dl'; bd.textContent = 'DL HD';
  bd.href = a.s; bd.download = a.f;
  bd.onclick = function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); };

  btns.appendChild(bv); btns.appendChild(bd);
  ov.appendChild(lbl); ov.appendChild(nm); ov.appendChild(btns);

  /* Badges */
  var badge = document.createElement('div'); badge.className = 'pcard-badge'; badge.textContent = CN[a.c]||a.c;
  var wm    = document.createElement('div'); wm.className    = 'pcard-wm';    wm.textContent    = '\u00a9 Filigrane';

  d.appendChild(img); d.appendChild(ov); d.appendChild(badge); d.appendChild(wm);
  d.onclick = function(){ oLb(gi); };
  d.onkeydown = function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' ') oLb(gi); };
  return d;
}

/* ─── Render ─── */
function render(list) {
  var g = document.getElementById('grid');
  g.innerHTML = '';
  if (!list.length) {
    var em = document.createElement('div'); em.className = 'empty-state';
    em.textContent = 'Aucun support trouv\u00e9'; g.appendChild(em);
  } else {
    list.forEach(function(a, i) {
      var gi = ALL.indexOf(a);
      var c  = mkCard(a, gi);
      c.style.animation = 'cardUp .42s ease ' + (i * 0.022) + 's both';
      g.appendChild(c);
    });
  }
  var n = list.length;
  document.getElementById('rc').textContent = n + ' support' + (n>1?'s':'') + ' affich\u00e9' + (n>1?'s':'');
  document.getElementById('pf-count').textContent = n + ' cr\u00e9ation' + (n>1?'s':'') + ' officielle' + (n>1?'s':'');
}

/* ─── Filter ─── */
function applyFilter() {
  var q = document.getElementById('srch').value.toLowerCase().trim();
  render(ALL.filter(function(a) {
    var mc = fil==='all' || a.c===fil;
    var mq = !q || a.l.toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0 || (CN[a.c]||'').toLowerCase().indexOf(q)>=0;
    return mc && mq;
  }));
}

document.getElementById('tabs').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  var btn = e.target.closest('.tab');
  if (!btn) return;
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(function(b){ b.classList.remove('on'); });
  btn.classList.add('on');
  fil = btn.dataset.cat;
  applyFilter();
});
document.getElementById('srch').addEventListener('input', applyFilter);

/* ─── Lightbox ─── */
function oLb(gi) {
  cur = gi;
  var a = ALL[gi];
  var im = document.getElementById('lb-i');
  im.style.opacity = '0';
  im.src = '';
  setTimeout(function(){
    im.src = a.s;
    im.onload = function(){ im.style.transition='opacity .4s'; im.style.opacity='1'; };
  }, 20);
  document.getElementById('lb-t').textContent = a.l;
  document.getElementById('lb-c').textContent = CN[a.c]||a.c;
  document.getElementById('lb-n').textContent = (gi+1) + ' / ' + ALL.length;
  var dl = document.getElementById('lb-d'); dl.href = a.s; dl.download = a.f;
  document.getElementById('lb').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function cLb() {
  document.getElementById('lb').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
function nLb(dir) {
  cur = (cur + dir + ALL.length) % ALL.length;
  oLb(cur);
}

document.getElementById('lb').addEventListener('click', function(e){ if(e.target===this) cLb(); });
document.getElementById('lb-x').addEventListener('click', cLb);
document.getElementById('lb-p').addEventListener('click', function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); nLb(-1); });
document.getElementById('lb-nx').addEventListener('click', function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); nLb(1); });
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
  if (!document.getElementById('lb').classList.contains('open')) return;
  if (e.key==='Escape') cLb();
  if (e.key==='ArrowLeft') nLb(-1);
  if (e.key==='ArrowRight') nLb(1);
});

/* Touch swipe */
var tsX=0, tsY=0;
document.getElementById('lb').addEventListener('touchstart', function(e){
  tsX=e.touches[0].clientX; tsY=e.touches[0].clientY;
},{passive:true});
document.getElementById('lb').addEventListener('touchend', function(e){
  var dx=e.changedTouches[0].clientX-tsX, dy=e.changedTouches[0].clientY-tsY;
  if (Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy) && Math.abs(dx)>48) nLb(dx<0?1:-1);
},{passive:true});

/* ─── Share / Copy link ─── */
function share() {
  var url = window.location.href;
  if (navigator.share) {
    navigator.share({
      title: 'Complexe Siama \u2014 Portfolio Branding 380\u00b0',
      text: '33 cr\u00e9ations visuelles officielles \u2014 H\u00f4tellerie \u00b7 Gastronomie \u00b7 \u00c9v\u00e9nementiel',
      url: url
    }).catch(function(){});
  } else if (navigator.clipboard) {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(showToast).catch(fallbackCopy);
  } else {
    fallbackCopy();
  }
}
function fallbackCopy() {
  try {
    var ta = document.createElement('textarea');
    ta.value = window.location.href;
    ta.style.position='fixed'; ta.style.opacity='0';
    document.body.appendChild(ta); ta.select();
    document.execCommand('copy');
    document.body.removeChild(ta);
    showToast();
  } catch(e){}
}
function showToast() {
  var t = document.getElementById('toast');
  t.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(function(){ t.classList.remove('show'); }, 2800);
}

/* ─── Smooth anchor links ─── */
document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(function(a){
  a.addEventListener('click', function(e){
    var id = a.getAttribute('href').slice(1);
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) { e.preventDefault(); el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}); }
  });
});

/* ─── Splash removal ─── */
function hideSplash() {
  document.getElementById('splash').classList.add('hide');
}

/* ─── Init ─── */
render(ALL);

/* R/* Remove splash after fonts + first render */
if (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready) {
  document.fonts.ready.then(function(){ setTimeout(hideSplash, 500); });
} else {
  setTimeout(hideSplash, 800);
}

})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
